content.en:
Jin Chen Holy Ancestor, in the middle stage of the Superior Domain Ancestor, was once regarded as an invincible Domain Ancestor in the Dark Sacred Domain, and his reputation was very great, and he was later promoted to the Peerless Domain Ancestor, and served as the Holy Lord of the Qingyuan Holy Land, and now he is the Supreme Elder of the Qingyuan Holy Land.

"Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestors, you killed so many invincible domain ancestors in my Qingyuan Holy Land, and broke the foundation of my Qingyuan Holy Land, I can't spare you today!"

Jin Chen Holy Ancestor roared angrily.

At this moment, he would not be afraid of Ye Tian's identity, even if he killed Ye Tian?

Could it be that the battle gate will come to kill him?

Moreover, this time it was Ye Tian who broke into the Qingyuan Holy Land and slaughtered the invincible domain ancestor of their Qingyuan Holy Land, even if there was a reason, the Qingyuan Holy Land still took possession.

Therefore, even if he really killed Ye Tian, there would be absolutely nothing to do.

"Die!"

Jinchen Holy Ancestor grabbed Ye Tian with one hand, and the countless rules of this grasp shattered, terrifying to the extreme.

Surreptitiously.

Some of the invincible domain ancestors of other forces have also spied on the situation here through the infinite territory.

As soon as they saw Jinchen Holy Ancestor make a move, their hearts trembled.

This is a superior domain ancestor, you can easily wipe out an invincible domain ancestor, even if it is a step invincible domain ancestor is not the opponent of the invincible domain ancestor, as long as some existence beyond the invincible domain ancestor, such as the five thunder domain ancestors and other invincible domain ancestors, you can rely on the terrifying combat power to fight with the weaker invincible domain ancestors.

And Jinchen Saint Ancestor is not the kind of invincible domain ancestor who has just been promoted and is weaker, but the middle stage of the invincible domain ancestor, and it has been endless years since he entered the invincible domain ancestor.

Therefore, no one thought that Ye Tian would be able to compete with the Jinchen Holy Ancestor.

At this time, Ye Tian revealed his ancestor.

Bang!!!!

The Eternal Immortal Ancestral Body was revealed, and many ancestral skills were added, and a spear immediately stabbed at the Jinchen Holy Ancestor.

Bang!

Ye Tian's attack collided with the palm of the Jinchen Holy Ancestor.

Suddenly, the light of annihilation swept through everything, and some of the ancestors of the Qingyuan Holy Territory who had not yet moved away from the excitement were affected one after another, and they were instantly turned into ashes.

And Ye Tian only retreated a few distances, but on the other hand, the Jinchen Holy Ancestor flew out upside down.

Surreptitiously.

One by one, the snooping Invincible Domain Ancestors were shocked.

"The Superior Domain Ancestor was sent flying?"

"The strength of the Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor is too terrifying, it can actually knock the Jinchen Holy Ancestor away! Could it be that the Jinchen Holy Ancestor is too seriously injured and has not recovered so far, so this is careless?"

"It's not careless, Jinchen Holy Ancestor's injury is estimated to have recovered more than ninety percent, you take a closer look at Ye Tian's situation, it is the ancestral body, and there is an aura of ancestral skills on his body!"

"Ye Tian's holy body is the Eternal Immortal Holy Body, the first holy body of the Dark Sacred Realm, and now it has broken the shackles and condensed into the Eternal Immortal Ancestral Body. And he knows too many ancestral skills, which is why such a terrifying combat power has exploded!"

......

Golden Silk Ancestral Technique!

False slash!

Empty Escape Ancestral Technique!

Ye Tian burst out with all his combat power, especially the Void Slash Ancestor Technique, the power was too terrifying.

Each blow that slashed at Jinchen Saint Ancestor's body shattered his Peerless Domain and injured him.

However, the attack of the Jinchen Holy Ancestor could not hit Ye Tian, who had the Empty Escape Ancestor Technique.

"Jinchen Holy Ancestor, you don't even have an ancestral body, you don't know a single ancestral skill, and you want to kill me?"

Ye Tian mocked to his heart's content.

"If I step into the Invincible Domain Ancestor, no, even if I break the extreme of the Invincible Domain Body, even if I only carry out an Invincible Domain Body transformation, I can easily kill you!"

Ye Tian continued.

"Damn it!"

Jinchen Holy Ancestor couldn't refute it, because what Ye Tian said was the truth.

He could see that Ye Tian's control over the physical body was not high, it was only dozens of times, and if he controlled it to 365 times, he would not be able to compete with Ye Tian far from it.

Once Ye Tian was really allowed to complete the transformation of the invincible domain body, he would really be killed by it.

Now, he only relied on the advantages of the Peerless Domain Body and the recovery ability of the Peerless Domain Ancestor to be able to compete with Ye Tian.

However, at the end of the fight, Jinchen Saint Ancestor's injuries became more and more serious.

Ordinary attacks can't actually cause any damage to the Ancestor of the Superior Domain, and their Ancestor Domain is directly immune to most attacks, but the attack brought by the Ancestral Skill and the Ancestor Body is too damaging to the Ancestor of the Superior Domain.

Whether it is an ancestral body or an ancestral technique, it actually involves the ancestor level.

For the Ancestor level, there was no difference between a Superior Domain Ancestor and an ant.

Therefore, the ancestral body and ancestral technique are very terrifying things, even if many unattained domain ancestors are very eager for the ancestral body and ancestral skills, as long as they can practice the ancestral body or ancestral skills, then the unadvanced domain ancestor will be above the ordinary unsuperior domain ancestor.

It's like the Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor, the leader of the Ghost Fox Organization, as a Superior Domain Ancestor, and the heir of an ancestor, but because he didn't practice the ancestral body and didn't have ancestral skills, he was beaten by the incarnation of the Fire Emblem Battle Ancestor.

The strength of that Ghost Fox Emperor Ancestor was not even as good as that of Jinchen Holy Ancestor.

Rumble!!!!

Ye Tian's void slash hit the Jinchen Holy Ancestor again, and part of the Jinchen Holy Ancestor's physical body was annihilated, although he recovered his physical body in an instant, but the injury was even more serious.

Abrupt!

Jinchen Holy Ancestor begged for mercy: "Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor, we apologize in Qingyuan Holy Land, how is today's matter?"

"Forget it?" Ye Tian sneered, "I killed so many invincible domain ancestors in your Qingyuan Holy Land, you can't forget it, I won't leave any hidden dangers for myself, today I will kill a peerless domain ancestor!"

"Ten Thousand Law Domain Ancestor, don't be too arrogant, just by you, you can't kill me!"

Jinchen Holy Ancestor was furious.

Bang!!!!

The fight continues!

Suddenly, Jinchen Holy Ancestor took out a piece of paper, and his face showed a pain in his face, obviously this piece of paper was very extraordinary, extremely valuable, and it was one of his most precious things.

I saw that the Jinchen Holy Ancestor urged this piece of paper, and a terrifying creature emerged.

It was a humanoid creature, but it had a hideous, devil-like face, about 30,000 feet tall, and was covered in scales.

It's just a phantom, but it gives everyone a great terror.

Abrupt.

This humanoid phantom stretched out his claws and grabbed at Ye Tian, the speed was not very fast, but it seemed to ignore time, or time forbidden.

Ye Tian couldn't dodge, and he didn't even use the Empty Escape Ancestor Technique, and he was grabbed through his body by the other party's claw.

Burst!

Ye Tian vomited blood and was seriously injured.

"Immortal Ancestral Technique, Recover!"

Ye Tian urged the Immortal Ancestral Technique, and the injuries on his body healed quickly, but some forces could not escape, and Ye Tian's injuries had been hidden, but under the effect of the Immortal Ancestral Technique, they were still worn out little by little.

"What the hell is that phantom, it doesn't seem to be a forbidden creature, nor does it look like the Destruction Saint Clan or the Three Thousand Evil Clans of the Dark Destruction Domain!

Ye Tian thought to himself.

But now is not the time to think about this, but to kill the Jinchen Holy Ancestor.

At this time, Jinchen Holy Ancestor was stunned.

"You can even immortalize the Ancestral Technique!"

Jinchen Holy Ancestor showed an unwilling look.

If Ye Tian didn't have the Immortal Ancestral Technique to recover from his injuries, the blow just now would have severely injured Ye Tian, causing Ye Tian to lose eighty or ninety percent of his combat effectiveness.

And now, Ye Tian's injuries are recovering too quickly.

"Run!"

Jinchen Holy Ancestor didn't want to die, so he could only choose to escape.
